response.justification: Highly qualified full-stack engineer with extensive TypeScript and Node.js expertise—the exact primary stack—plus recent AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. Demonstrates strong software engineering discipline through 15+ years of TDD, testing, and architecture contributions. Career gap of ~7 months and missing specific Nest.js/Vitest experience are minor concerns but easily addressable given demonstrated ability to master multiple tech stacks.
strengths: Expert in primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js) with recent hands-on experience and demonstrated full-stack proficiency across multiple platforms
Direct AI agent infrastructure experience from current re:cinq role, plus proven mastery of cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) at scale
Strong software engineering discipline—15+ years of TDD practice, testing culture, mentorship, and architecture-level contributions across senior roles
concerns: Career gap of ~7 months since October 2025 due to caregiving; immediate availability and re-onboarding timeline needs clarification
No explicit Nest.js experience despite it being primary tech; Node.js expertise is strong but framework-specific knowledge gap exists
Missing stated technical requirements: Python not in background, and specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js mastery with recent hands-on experience
Career gap duration and current availability
AI agent and modern infrastructure experience
